response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned senior engineer with broad full-stack experience and some GIS exposure (Open Green Map, GISCollective), but the role requires modern C++ or Rust as the primary language and neither appears as a recent, substantial skill. C++ experience is limited to a brief stint at National Instruments over a decade ago and a bachelor thesis, with no demonstrated work on routing pipelines, navigation guidance, or large-scale distributed data systems. Geospatial background is genuine but at a smaller scale than production routing tiling for global users.
strengths: Genuine geospatial/GIS domain experience via GISCollective and Open Green Map
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, testing culture, low-latency systems at Sociomantic
Long senior-level track record across diverse stacks and infrastructure
concerns: No recent or substantial modern C++ or Rust experience — primary stack is TS/Node/DLang
No experience with routing pipelines, map tiling, or navigation guidance systems
Limited evidence of large-scale distributed systems work on production data pipelines
